title: micromeria graeca var. angustifolia
intro: Micromeria graeca var. angustifolia, also known as Greek mint or mountain mint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and inflammation. The health benefits of Micromeria graeca var. angustifolia include its ability to relieve nausea, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
